title: moraea elliotii
intro: Moraea elliotii, also known as the African yellow iris, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Iridaceae family of flowering plants. The plant's rhizomes and roots have been traditionally used in medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Moraea elliotii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Moraea elliotii often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's parts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or poultices for various medicinal applications.
